head: bffe32e4

scenarios.reply_summary: Summarises principles.md P1-P8 with descriptions and traps.
Says 'I couldn't find any skill.md files under src/ that mention judge_output.' Rubric requires listing at least one file path.
scenarios.failure_reason: rubric: no file path listed (env: src/ tree may not include skill.md that mentions judge_output, or LLM gave up early)

scenarios.reply_summary: Reports search results — found CrewAI changelog mentioning openai SDK; references OpenAI and Python SDK.
scenarios.notes: router_empty_response_retry_injected fired and recovered to a valid reply (envelope fix B44 wave WORKING).

scenarios.reply_summary: Refuses: 'cannot fulfill this request. Fetching the content of the URL is not allowed due to permission restrictions.'
scenarios.failure_reason: tool_failed before web_fetch_started; no permission_denied event though reply says permission denied (mismatch — likely default permission policy).

scenarios.reply_summary: Reports failure: 'Python interpreter could not be found or accessed due to file system sandbox restrictions.'
scenarios.failure_reason: rubric: did not report output 4; sandbox environment lacks python interpreter access (B43/B42 also R likely).

scenarios.reply_summary: Says no direct 'lint' action exists; describes index_events action instead. No pass/fail nor error count reported.
scenarios.failure_reason: Router answered inline without invoking lint skill; chat_turn_completed_inline replaced routing_decided. Affordance gap — LLM didn't see lint_plan op as available.

scenarios.reply_summary: Returns 'Error: KeyError: sources' — skill failure for environmental reason (no indexed sources / corpus not set up).
scenarios.failure_reason: skill failed for env reason (no indexed corpus); rubric requires either docs OR explicit 'no sources' report; KeyError is neither — inconclusive per worker prompt (skill failed for env reason = I).

scenarios.reply_summary: Reports judge_phase passed both criteria with score 1.0; references criteria (non-empty description, declared phase).
scenarios.notes: invoke_skill_spawn_ack_exit + router_empty_response_retry_injected BOTH fired and led to successful skill_completion_injected → V. B44 envelope-fix wave evidence.

scenarios.reply_summary: Turn 1: asks for skill name (good ask). Turn 2: 'skill_builder encountered error during plan_skill phase and was rolled back.' No user_intervention_requested/received events fired — skill_builder failed before reaching ask_user phase.
scenarios.failure_reason: skill_builder hit phase_rollback in plan_skill before ever emitting ask_user; user-supplied name in turn 2 was actually the round-trip prompt but skill workflow had already aborted. envelope-fix events fired but did not save scenario.

router_empty_response_retry_injected.outcome: S3 + S8 recovered to V; S9 still R (skill_builder failed independently of router envelope issue)

invoke_skill_spawn_ack_exit.outcome: S8 V (clean spawn-ack-exit + completion injection); S9 fires but skill itself aborts in plan_skill

new_findings: B44-W3-F1: web_fetch tool_failed without permission_denied event despite reply citing permission restrictions (S4). Either permission policy default blocks web_fetch silently or web_fetch wrapper raises before emitting permission_denied. Worth investigating event/error layer alignment.

B44-W3-F2: lint_a_skill (S6) regressed to inline router answer — chat_turn_completed_inline replaced routing_decided. LLM lists index_events as alternative; lint_plan op affordance not visible to router in chat context. Affordance-bias variant of B41 lint regression.

B44-W3-F3: skill_builder plan_skill phase consistently hits phase_rollback in S9. preprocessor_step_completed fires once, then 3 phase_started cycles end in rollback. ask_user op never reached. Unrelated to envelope-fix wave but blocks ask_user round-trip verification.

B44-W3-F4 (positive): envelope-fix wave (router_empty_response_retry_injected + invoke_skill_spawn_ack_exit + skill_completion_injected) fired 3 + 2 + 2 times across S3/S8/S9 with no false-positive injections; S3 + S8 directly converted from likely-R/I in B42/B43 baseline to V here. Direct primary evidence of envelope fix working.
